Top Picks

Highest combined value + trending score

$1 Rooftop Tacos (Saturday)

The Ready Rooftop
$1/taco

$1 tacos on a rooftop in the East Village. High viral potential. Saturday only.

East Village (112 E 11th St)★10🔥9

$6-Capped Food Items (Sat market)

Queens Night Market
$6/item

Seasonal Saturday market with 80+ vendors and capped affordable pricing. Must-visit event.

Flushing Meadows-Corona Park★10🔥9

Peanut Noodles + Dumplings

Shu Jiao Fu Zhou
$3.50

Creamy peanut noodles under $4. Pork & chive dumplings 6 for ~$3. Chinatown legend. Cash only.

Chinatown (295 Grand St)★10🔥8

Roast Pork Over Rice

Wah Fung No. 1 Fast Food
~$5

Extremely low-cost roast meat rice boxes. Long line, massive portions, incredible value.

Chinatown (79 Chrystie St)★9🔥9

Spicy Cumin Lamb Noodles

Xi'an Famous Foods
$10–$14

Hand-pulled noodles in spicy cumin lamb sauce. Started in a Flushing food court, now an empire.

Multiple locations★8🔥10

Adobada Tacos (2–3 = a meal)

Los Tacos No. 1
$4–$5/taco

Best tacos in NYC. Homemade tortillas, real marinated pork. 2–3 tacos is a full meal under $15.

Chelsea Market / Times Square★8🔥10

Prices verified May 2026. Always call ahead — deals change without notice.

Data from Eater NY, The Infatuation, Yelp, EatDrinkDeals, MurphGuide, Happy-Hour.nyc, SecretNYC, Resy, NY Post, and direct restaurant sites.
